name: 2026 Day 4 - Vibe Coding Agent Security and Evaluation - Google AI Agents Course.pptx
description:
"Vibe Coding Agent Security and Evaluation" whitepaper talks about redefining security and evaluation in non-deterministic AI workflows by establishing continuous "Effective Trust" through a strict 7-pillar architecture. It outlines practical safeguards such as ephemeral sandboxing, defenses against hallucinated "slopsquatting" packages, an active Red/Blue/Green security triad, and OpenTelemetry trajectory evaluation.

Read the whitepaper here: https://www.kaggle.com/whitepaper-vibe-coding-agent-security-and-evaluation
